name: Android Studio VNC (Port 5901)
postCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y wget unzip libxrender1 libxtst6 libxi6 libgl1-mesa-glx && wget https://redirector.gvt1.com/edgedl/android/studio/ide-zips/2024.2.1.11/android-studio-2024.2.1.11-linux.tar.gz && tar -xzf android-studio-2024.2.1.11-linux.tar.gz && rm android-studio-*.tar.gz && echo 'export DISPLAY=:1' >> ~/.bashrc
